title: FIGURE 2 in Glycolytic modulations and antioxidant capacity in Amazonian fish, Bryconops giacopinii (Characiformes: Iguanodectidae), living at high temperature
author: Campos, Derek Felipe de
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: FIGURE 2 | A. LDH enzyme activity in different concentrations of substrate (pyruvate, mM);B. Maximum velocity of lactate dehydrogenase (LDH), and C. Enzyme affinity (Kmpyr) of lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) in muscle of different populations of Bryconops giacopinii that inhabit different thermal habitats (for details see Material and Methods).
